# Dr. Dwarakanath Reddy — GI & Laparoscopic Surgeon, Nellore

> Dr. Dwarakanath Reddy Vembuluru is a Senior Consultant in Gastrointestinal and Hepato-Pancreatico-Biliary (HPB) Surgery at Apollo Speciality Hospitals, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh, India. He holds a DrNB in Surgical Gastroenterology (the highest super-specialisation for GI surgery in India), with over a decade of surgical practice and 3,000+ procedures across laparoscopic, HPB, GI oncology, and bariatric surgery. Rated 5.0 on Google from 428 verified reviews.

Qualifications: MBBS (2012), MS General Surgery (2016), DrNB Surgical Gastroenterology (2019). Andhra Pradesh Medical Council registration APMC/FMR/77348. Languages: English, Telugu, Hindi. Practice location: Apollo Speciality Hospitals, Muthukur Road, Nellore 524004. Appointments are booked directly with Dr. Reddy via WhatsApp/phone on +91 89851 35935.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/): Overview of Dr. Reddy's practice, specialties, and approach to GI surgery.
- [About Dr. Reddy](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/about-doctor/): Full biography, training, qualifications, publications, and awards.
- [Contact & Appointments](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/contact/): Booking form, WhatsApp, direct phone line, address, hours, and map to Apollo Nellore.
- [For Referring Doctors](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/referring-doctors/): Referral pathway and case information for clinicians.

## Surgical services (by specialty)
- [Surgical Gastroenterology](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/surgical-gastroenterology/): Specialist surgical care for the full digestive tract — oesophagus to rectum, plus liver, pancreas, and biliary tract.
- [Laparoscopic Surgery](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/laparoscopic-surgery/): Minimally invasive surgery including gallbladder (cholecystectomy) and hernia repair.
- [HPB Surgery](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/hpb-surgery/): Hepato-pancreatico-biliary surgery for the liver, pancreas, and bile ducts.
- [GI Oncology](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/gi-oncology/): Cancer surgery for colon, rectum, stomach, oesophagus, liver, pancreas, and gallbladder.
- [Bariatric Surgery](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/bariatric-surgery/): Weight-loss and metabolic surgery — gastric bypass and sleeve gastrectomy.
- [Upper GI Surgery](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/upper-gi-surgery/): Surgery for the oesophagus and stomach, including anti-reflux procedures.
- [Endoscopy](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/endoscopy/), [Colonoscopy](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/colonoscopy/), [ERCP](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/gi-services/ercp/): Diagnostic and therapeutic GI endoscopy.

## Conditions treated
- [Conditions index](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/conditions/): Patient-education pages on gallstones, hernia, GERD, achalasia, appendicitis, obesity, and GI cancers (colorectal, stomach, oesophageal, liver, pancreatic, gallbladder).

## Patient resources
- [Patient Resources](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/patient-resources/): Pre- and post-operative guidance for patients.
- [Success Stories](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/success-stories/) and [Case Studies](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/case-studies/): Real patient outcomes and clinical cases.
- [Blog](https://gastrosurgeonnellore.com/blogs/): Articles on GI conditions and procedures.
